paradigm: atlas drift line-by-line remediation proposer (NON_MUTATION; cycle 17 follow-up)

witness_id_W_tier_FP.reason: cycle 17 regex `R\d+_...` too strict; W-tier (Witness-tier R-tier predecessor) entries valid by atlas convention
witness_id_W_tier_FP.remediation: extend cycle 17 regex to (R|W)\d+_... (helper-side fix, not atlas mutation)

descriptive_label_xlinks_FP.reason: cycle 17 path-detection heuristic too permissive; descriptive labels (e.g. R34_CANDIDATE (Phi coeff...)) caught as paths
descriptive_label_xlinks_FP.remediation: tighten cycle 17 path heuristic: require startswith (state|tool|docs|anima|edu)/ AND no parens AND no spaces

line_specific_proposals.proposed_fix: manually inspect line; restore valid JSON syntax (likely truncated or escape error)
line_specific_proposals.side_effect: fixing parse error may also resolve associated round gap (recovery)

line_specific_proposals.proposed_fix: review both occurrences of round 40; either renumber later one to next-available round, or merge if duplicate content
line_specific_proposals.side_effect: renumber may shift gaps; recompute via cycle 17 after fix

line_specific_proposals.proposed_fix: review both occurrences of round 46; either renumber later one to next-available round, or merge if duplicate content
line_specific_proposals.side_effect: renumber may shift gaps; recompute via cycle 17 after fix

line_specific_proposals.proposed_fix: review both occurrences of round 49; either renumber later one to next-available round, or merge if duplicate content
line_specific_proposals.side_effect: renumber may shift gaps; recompute via cycle 17 after fix

line_specific_proposals.proposed_fix: evidence: was round 38 an authentic skip (rejected entry?) or accidental gap? consult git log atlas history
manual_steps: search for original round {g} entry if any
line_specific_proposals.side_effect: restoring entry may shift subsequent line numbers; preserve sha-locked downstream artifacts

application_procedure: 5. re-run cycle 17 verifier to confirm INTEGRITY_OK
6. commit cleanup PR (separate from any helper batch)
non_mutation_guarantee: helper does NOT modify atlas JSONL; user manual edit + chflags unlock/relock required
cycle_17_helper_side_remediation: extend witness_id regex to (R|W)\d+_... (eliminates 22 W-tier FP)
tighten path-detection heuristic to startswith (state|tool|docs|anima|edu)/ AND no parens (eliminates ~14 descriptive FP)
